regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Tauranga typically charge $80–$120/hr plus a $50–$80 callout fee. Bay of Plenty has seen increased demand from rapid residential growth.

businesses.name: Wolf Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Family business providing plumbing and drainlaying across Auckland and Tauranga; 46 jobs completed with consistent 5-star reviews.

businesses.name: Jensen Plumbing & Gas
businesses.known_for: Full-service plumbing and gasfitting including kitchens, bathrooms, heating, solar, roofing and drainlaying across Bay of Plenty.

businesses.name: Summit Plumbing & Gas
businesses.known_for: Plumbing, gas fitting and drainage services across Papamoa, Mount Maunganui, Tauranga and the Western Bay of Plenty.

businesses.name: Kingdom plumbing
businesses.known_for: Maintenance and renovations: bathroom renovations, hot water cylinder installation and pipe replacement work.

businesses.name: GREENFOX
businesses.known_for: Sustainable energy solutions, plumbing and roof painting; specialises in solar hot water-saving systems and waterproofing.
